ddls:
CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the template (e.g., Splash page, Home page) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the template was last updated */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the template (e.g., Templates, Templates/Home) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the template */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the template (e.g., Need to revalidate, Up to spec) */,
  "specification" TEXT /* Specification of the template (e.g., C&IA) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the template (e.g., v1.4, v2.0) */,
  "template_type" TEXT /* Type of the template (e.g., HTML, CSS, JavaScript) */,
  "template_size" INTEGER /* Size of the template in bytes */,
  "template_format" TEXT /* Format of the template (e.g., JSON, XML) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the template was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the template */,
  "last_updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last updated the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_version FOREIGN KEY ("version") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_templates_specification FOREIGN KEY ("specification") REFERENCES specifications ("specification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Parent category ID */,
  "category_order" INTEGER /* Order of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "status_order" INTEGER /* Order of the status */,
  "status_color" TEXT /* Color associated with the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specifications" (
  "specification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specification */,
  "specification_name" TEXT /* Name of the specification */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the specification */,
  "specification_version" TEXT /* Version number of the specification */,
  "specification_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the specification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specification_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "version_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each usage event */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template being used */,
  "section" TEXT /* Section of the website where the template is used */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the usage event */,
  "usage_type" TEXT /* Type of usage event (e.g., page view, template edit) */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the template was used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_usage_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_usage_section FOREIGN KEY ("section") REFERENCES sections ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sections" (
  "section_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each section */,
  "section_name" TEXT /* Name of the section */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the section */,
  "section_order" INTEGER /* Order of the section */,
  "section_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the section */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("section_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, designer, content creator) */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "role_permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "template_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template being revised */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the revision */,
  "revision_author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_template_revisions_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the template */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the template was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used by the user (e.g., browser type, operating system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
